title: Too Many Renames
description: Over 6000 cosmetic items! In vanilla by renaming items in an anvil! Weapons your favorite franchise, placable foods, and custom torches - All name dependent! Additional variants for your world without replacing existing stuff!
body:
# MORE MINECRAFT IN MINECRAFT

# OVER 6000 COSMETIC VARIANTS ADDED!

# RENAME YOUR ITEMS IN AN ANVIL FOR INFINITE CUSTOMIZATION!

# NEW STUFF WITHOUT REPLACING EXISTING TEXTURES!

![Some of the named variants my this pack adds!](https://i.redd.it/s0q08ghzmtde1.png)

# And there's a LOT MORE than just this!! Check out the FULL DOCUMENT OF RENAMES:

# [ALL NAMED VARIANTS IN THIS PACK](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1kSjHyrZ60fVfBGip9Ho6QbFmMZ1CCtDfqIQLVj4hFvM/edit?usp=sharing)

## Updated often!

### Includes:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/gZctspAFf_U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## More clocks!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OI9APvuQJK4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



There's A LOT MORE! [Click here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1kSjHyrZ60fVfBGip9Ho6QbFmMZ1CCtDfqIQLVj4hFvM/edit?usp=sharing) to see the FULL LIST OF NAMED VARIANTS IN THIS PACK

(as of now armor/elytra still require mods such as OptiFine)

## THIS PACK ALSO ALLOWS FOR CUSTOM TORCHES!

By renaming various items like iron nuggets or a stone type to "Sconce", you will get an item that looks like a custom torch when placed in an item frame behind a torch!
That was a mouthful of test...but it's a really cool feature and it's avaliable in many styles!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FRA9wpf8ZFs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
